assumptions: The intragroup dividend gives rise to a recognised intragroup receivable/payable denominated in a foreign currency.
The question concerns the consolidated financial statements.

approaches.label: Hedge accounting under IFRS 9
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context includes IFRS 9 hedge accounting, including the possibility of designating recognised items and certain intragroup foreign currency exposures as hedged items in consolidated financial statements.

approaches.label: Foreign currency accounting under IAS 21 without hedge accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context includes IAS 21 treatment of exchange differences on monetary items, including intragroup monetary balances in consolidated financial statements, which is the baseline model if hedge accounting is not applied.
